title: South Korea proposes extra $17 billion budget to cushion energy costs fueled by Iran war
summary_full: Seoul imports 94% of its energy needs, and almost 72% of its crude oil comes from the Middle East.
summary_public: Seoul imports 94% of its energy needs, and almost 72% of its crude oil comes from the Middle East.
